description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sanitize that runs on every push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs, sanitize_clang and sanitize_gcc, both running on ubuntu-20.04. Each job should check out the repository, install necessary dependencies, configure the build project with specific CMake flags, build the project, and run tests with ctest, using either clang or gcc compilers with address and undefined sanitizers enabled.
